parameters.query:
INSERT INTO processing_logs (
    execution_id,
    intake_event_id,
    stage,
    status,
    details,
    error_text,
    attempt
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
    NULL,
    '{{ $json.stage }}',
    '{{ $json.status }}',
    '{{ ($json.details || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($json.error_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.attempt || 1 }}
);

nodes.name: Restore error context after PG log
